description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: one for building and testing with multiple Python versions and another for building a .deb package. The first job checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs pre-commit hooks, unit tests, and CLI tests. The second job checks out the code, verifies the Debian version, builds a .deb package, installs it, runs CLI tests, and uploads the Debian packages as an artifact.
